products.name: InnovizOne™
products.descriptor: Solid-state automotive-grade LiDAR sensor, up to 250 m detection range

evidence.snippet: LiDAR is advancing to withstand adverse weather conditions like rain, snow, fog, and dust with greater accuracy. The InnovizOne can deliver a 3D point cloud at distances up to 250 meters, while maintaining resistance to a variety of weather conditions, regardless of sunlight.

products.name: InnovizTwo Long-Range
products.descriptor: Automotive-grade LiDAR sensor designed for L3 consumer vehicles

products.name: InnovizTwo Short- to Mid-Range
products.descriptor: Automotive-grade LiDAR for light commercial vehicles, shuttles, robotaxis, and trucks

evidence.snippet: For Light Commercial Vehicles, Shuttles, Robotaxis and Trucks

products.name: InnovizTwo Ultra Long-Range
products.descriptor: Automotive-grade solid-state LiDAR with up to 1 km sensing range for automotive and SMART applications

evidence.snippet: Redefining Automotive-Grade LiDAR Capabilities for Automotive and SMART Applications

### [Innoviz Technologies Launches InnovizTwo Ultra Long-Range (ULR) LiDAR, Delivering up to 1-Kilometer Sensing](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/innoviz-technologies-launches-innoviztwo-ultra-long-range-ulr-lidar-delivering-up-to-1-kilometer-sensing-to-power-next-generation-physical-ai-for-automotive-and-smart-applications-302750144.html)

products.name: InnovizSMART
products.descriptor: High-performance solid-state LiDAR for smart/security applications including perimeter intrusion detection

evidence.snippet: Optimize perimeter intrusion detection with InnovizSMART, where high-resolution 3D LiDAR sensing meets advanced sensor fusion. By integrating LiDAR with PTZ cameras, our technology detects low-signature threats and tracks multiple targets in real time with unmatched precision.

products.name: Perception Software
products.descriptor: AI/ML-based object classification, detection, and tracking software complementing Innoviz LiDAR hardware

evidence.snippet: **Innoviz has developed two high-performance automotive-grade solid-state [LiDAR sensors](https://innoviz.tech/lidar-sensors), plus industry-leading [perception software](https://innoviz.tech/perception-software).**

Innoviz’s offerings include [InnovizTwo](https://innoviz.tech/innoviztwo), for automotive-grade applications, and its [Perception Software](https://innoviz.tech/perception-software), designed to complement the hardware offerings with advanced AI and machine learning-based classification, detection and tracking features.
